name: Date Fruit Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Dates, stoned but not cut up
1 lb Walnut meats, not cut up
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix dates, walnuts, and cherries in a bowl.
2. In another bowl, sift together flour, salt, and baking powder.
3. Add the fruit mixture to the dry ingredients and mix well.
4. Stir in sugar until fully incorporated.
5. Beat the egg yolks until thick and fold into the cake batter.
6. Mix in vanilla extract.
7. Whisk the egg whites until stiff and dry.
8. Gently fold the egg whites into the batter.
9. Line two loaf pans with wax paper.
10. Pour the mixture into the prepared pans.
11. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
